subject: Your 14-day trial ends soon — here’s what you can keep
preview_text: Fix a VFD fault in 30 seconds, not 40 minutes. Keep full access for $97/mo.
headline: No more waiting on hold for Allen-Bradley code help
body_html:
{{FIRST_NAME}}, you’ve seen how fast Mira finds answers from your manuals.

When that GS20 throws F41, you don’t need a 30-minute call to the distributor. You need the fix — now.

With FactoryLM, you get:

▶ Photo diagnosis — snap a VFD screen, get the cause in 30 seconds

▶ RAG-powered search — pull answers from your PowerFlex guides, not Google

▶ One-click work orders — auto-create in CMMS when diagnosis is ready

Your trial ends in 48 hours. After that, you’ll keep full access for $97/month per facility — not per user, not per query.

48-hour refund window. No lock-in.
